mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS text) FROM preference.preference_tags WHERE tag_type = 'TAG' AND is_active = true AND is_selectable = true ORDER BY id
SELECT source FROM preference.tag_statistic_runs WHERE is_serving = true LIMIT 1
SELECT count(*) FROM preference.user_swipe_events WHERE reaction IN ('LIKE', 'SUPER_LIKE')

SELECT CAST(tag.tag_id AS text) AS tag_id, count(*) FILTER (WHERE reaction.reaction IN ('LIKE', 'SUPER_LIKE')) AS positive_count, count(*) AS reaction_count FROM preference.user_swipe_events reaction JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT enrichment.id FROM preference.place_tag_enrichments enrichment WHERE enrichment.status = 'SUCCEEDED' AND ( enrichment.id = reaction.place_tag_enrichment_id OR ( enrichment.provider = reaction.provider AND enrichment.external_place_id = reaction.external_place_id ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN enrichment.id = reaction.place_tag_enrichment_id THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, enrichment.enriched_at DESC NULLS LAST, enrichment.created_at DESC, enrichment.id LIMIT 1 ) selected_enrichment ON true JOIN preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags tag ON tag.enrichment_id = selected_enrichment.id GROUP BY tag.tag_id ORDER BY tag.tag_id

SELECT count(reaction.user_id) FROM preference.preference_tags core_tag LEFT JOIN ( SELECT real_event.user_id, place_tag.tag_id FROM preference.user_swipe_events real_event JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT enrichment.id FROM preference.place_tag_enrichments enrichment WHERE enrichment.status = 'SUCCEEDED' AND ( enrichment.id = real_event.place_tag_enrichment_id OR ( enrichment.provider = real_event.provider AND enrichment.external_place_id = real_event.external_place_id ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN enrichment.id = real_event.place_tag_enrichment_id THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, enrichment.enriched_at DESC NULLS LAST, enrichment.created_at DESC, enrichment.id LIMIT 1 ) selected_enrichment ON true JOIN preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags place_tag ON place_tag.enrichment_id = selected_enrichment.id ) reaction ON reaction.tag_id = core_tag.id WHERE core_tag.tag_type = 'TAG' AND core_tag.is_active = true AND core_tag.is_selectable = true GROUP BY core_tag.id ORDER BY core_tag.id
SELECT count(*) FROM preference.synthetic_swipe_events WHERE generator_version = #{generatorVersion} AND reaction IN ('LIKE', 'SUPER_LIKE')

SELECT CAST(tag.tag_id AS text) AS tag_id, count(*) FILTER (WHERE reaction.reaction IN ('LIKE', 'SUPER_LIKE')) AS positive_count, count(*) AS reaction_count FROM preference.synthetic_swipe_events reaction JOIN preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags tag ON tag.enrichment_id = reaction.place_tag_enrichment_id WHERE reaction.generator_version = #{generatorVersion} GROUP BY tag.tag_id ORDER BY tag.tag_id
SELECT count(*) FROM preference.synthetic_personas WHERE generator_version = #{generatorVersion} AND is_active = true

SELECT count(*) FROM preference.synthetic_personas persona WHERE persona.generator_version = #{generatorVersion} AND persona.is_active = true AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM preference.synthetic_swipe_events event WHERE event.persona_id = persona.id AND event.generator_version = persona.generator_version )

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT core_tag.id FROM preference.preference_tags core_tag LEFT JOIN preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags place_tag ON place_tag.tag_id = core_tag.id LEFT JOIN preference.synthetic_swipe_events event ON event.place_tag_enrichment_id = place_tag.enrichment_id AND event.generator_version = #{generatorVersion} WHERE core_tag.tag_type = 'TAG' AND core_tag.is_active = true AND core_tag.is_selectable = true GROUP BY core_tag.id HAVING count(event.id) < #{minimumReactionCount} ) unstable_tag
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.tag_statistic_runs ( id, source, status, alpha, global_positive_rate, total_reaction_count, positive_reaction_count, is_serving, started_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), #{source}, 'RUNNING', #{alpha}, #{globalPositiveRate}, #{totalReactionCount}, #{positiveReactionCount}, false, now() )

INSERT INTO preference.tag_statistics ( run_id, tag_id, preference_discrimination, smoothed_positive_rate, positive_count, reaction_count ) VALUES ( CAST(#{runId} AS uuid), CAST(#{tagId} AS uuid), #{preferenceDiscrimination}, #{smoothedPositiveRate}, #{positiveCount}, #{reactionCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE preference.tag_statistic_runs SET is_serving = false WHERE is_serving = true
UPDATE preference.tag_statistic_runs SET status = 'SUCCEEDED', is_serving = true, completed_at = now() WHERE id = CAST(#{runId} AS uuid)
